summary: FASE 4 (Replay + What-if + chambers count + steam injection) tested end-to-end. Fixed a route-ordering bug where POST /api/whatif/reset was matched by /api/whatif/{scenario_id}. All 16 backend pytest cases pass after fix. Frontend tabs, subtabs, file dropdown, count +/- control and steam testids verified.

minor.issue: Was being shadowed by /api/whatif/{scenario_id} (returned 422). FIXED by moving /whatif/reset above /whatif/{scenario_id} in server.py (same pattern already used for /camaras/count).

issues: In SVG mimic mode, TEMP and HR numeric values in the mimic box appear blank/cut (only unit symbol shown), while the bottom KPI strip shows them correctly (42.0°C / 85%). Likely a text fill / svg <text> sizing regression — not blocking but worth a look.

action_items: Verify the route fix on server.py for /whatif/reset (already applied by test agent, hot-reloaded).
Investigate SVG camera mimic: TEMP/HR numbers not visible inside the mimic frame (CSS color or text-anchor regression?). Bottom KPI strip is fine.
critical_code_review_comments: whatif_service.py L234: `if unit in self.runtime.modbus.context.slaves() if hasattr(...) else True` is a confusing inline conditional — should be parenthesized for clarity.
whatif_service.py L216: `from .. import server  # noqa` imports server but never reads ops_service prices — dead import; prices remain hardcoded (120/95) instead of live ops prices.

replay_service.py: thread is daemon but stop_locked() doesn't join — starting a new replay before old loop exits is mitigated only by self.active flag; consider join with short timeout to avoid two threads briefly writing the simulator.
server.py grew >1000 lines — consider splitting Fase4 routes into a separate router module.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on smoke (tabs, subtabs, count +/-, steam fields, replay file list)

seed_data_creation: None. Used preexisting yerba_history_2026-05-18.csv & yerba_history_2026-05-19.csv. What-if scenarios cleaned up via /whatif/reset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FASE 4 backend fully green. Frontend Replay & What-if tab works, file dropdown populated. The /whatif/reset route fix is critical — keep it ordered before /whatif/{scenario_id}. Regression checks for /energy, /oee, /recipes, /alarms/active still pass.
